title: Seedy Place
description:
A more vanilla way to automate plants. 

Drop most plants on the proper soil and they will plant themselves after a couple of seconds!
body:
Seedy Place!


This mod was created to solve a problem of mine.
I wanted to create a mod that will allow saplings and seeds
be planted where they lie on the ground.


This mod is currently for fabric, but the goal is to get it ported
to forge as well!
